title: Reading B1 - A Healthy Lifestyle
description: Practice reading test about health and daily habits
passage: Many people believe that living a healthy lifestyle is difficult, but small daily habits can make a big difference. Eating fresh fruit and vegetables, drinking enough water, and sleeping for seven to eight hours each night can improve both physical and mental health. Exercise is also important. People do not need to go to the gym every day; walking, cycling, or playing a sport with friends can help the body stay active. Another useful habit is reducing screen time before bed because it can help people sleep better. A healthy lifestyle is not about being perfect, but about making better choices every day.

questions.question: What can small daily habits do?
How many hours of sleep are recommended in the passage?
Which activity is mentioned as a form of exercise?
Why should people reduce screen time before bed?
What is a healthy lifestyle mainly about?
options: Going to the gym every day
